title: The Straw Hats Become Wanted Heroes
main_description: News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
key_events: The Straw Hats Become Wanted Heroes
News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
